name: markpad-open-exported-file-prompt
title: Markpad export: prompt to open exported file
original_prompt: Ten eksport do pliku czy to pdf czy htm powinien się zapytać czy otworzyć ten plik i otworzyć go w domyślnej aplikacji systemu.

entries.note: Started execution from the saved plan; scope is controlled HTML export prompt/open with PDF limitation recorded because current PDF export uses window.print().
Added a failing TypeScript helper test for the export-open prompt; npx tsx --test scripts/exportOpenPrompt.test.ts currently fails because src/lib/utils/openExportedFile.js does not exist yet.
Implemented the reusable askToOpenExportedFile helper and confirmed its focused test now passes.
Wired successful HTML export to askToOpenExportedFile using Tauri ask/openPath, added EN/PL labels, and recorded the current PDF print-dialog path limitation in code.

verification.command: npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts; npm run check
verification.outcome: PASS: npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts returned 37/37 passing. PASS: npm run check returned 0 errors and 14 existing warnings in Settings.svelte, TitleBar.svelte, and ZoomOverlay.svelte.

verification.command: npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle; install -m 0755 src-tauri/target/x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/release/Markpad.exe release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe; sha256sum Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe > release/windows/SHA256SUMS.txt; git diff --check
verification.outcome: PASS: npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle built src-tauri/target/x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/release/Markpad.exe. Copied it to release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe and refreshed SHA256SUMS.txt to f83bc1a4ecfdee63543b1d64bffc3fcdca53c371c3366814272f29b1962ebb90. PASS: git diff --check returned clean.

final_result: Implemented the HTML export post-save prompt/open flow using Tauri ask/openPath, added helper tests and EN/PL labels, documented the current PDF print-dialog limitation, refreshed the Windows standalone executable and SHA256SUMS. PDF prompt/open remains intentionally out of scope until Markpad owns the PDF output path instead of delegating to window.print().
